cards.title: Create a parenting rota to reduce couple conflict
cards.body: One couple developed a simple system to manage household duties and childcare after their second child was born. The structured approach helped eliminate arguments about who was doing more.

cards.title: How to handle toxic in-laws before having children
cards.body: If a partner's parent is cruel, it's wise to minimize contact with future children unless behavior changes dramatically. Setting boundaries early protects your family's wellbeing.

cards.title: Meningitis B vaccine offered to million young people
cards.body: A one-off vaccine programme is being rolled out following an unprecedented outbreak in Kent. This protects young people from a serious bacterial infection.

cards.title: Gender clinic failures put dozens of children at risk
cards.body: An inquiry found 78 children were potentially harmed after receiving gender medication without proper medical checks at a Brighton GP clinic. The safety failures highlight the need for stricter oversight.
